mapper.select: SELECT * FROM long_term_memory WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM long_term_memory WHERE content_vector_id = #{vectorId} AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE long_term_memory SET access_count = access_count + 1, last_access_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}

UPDATE long_term_memory SET access_count = access_count + 1, last_access_time = NOW() WHERE id IN
#{id}
UPDATE long_term_memory SET content = #{content}, importance_score = #{importanceScore}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
UPDATE long_term_memory SET is_deleted = 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}

UPDATE long_term_memory SET is_deleted = 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE id IN
#{id}
UPDATE long_term_memory SET is_deleted = 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND expire_time IS NOT NULL AND expire_time < NOW()
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM long_term_memory_config WHERE agent_id IS NULL AND tenant_id IS NULL LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE long_term_memory_config SET enabled = #{enabled}, similarity_threshold = #{similarityThreshold}, default_topk = #{defaultTopk}, max_topk = #{maxTopk}, retention_days = #{retentionDays}, auto_record_threshold = #{autoRecordThreshold}, auto_record_enabled = #{autoRecordEnabled}, memory_type = #{memoryType}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
